metadata.description: Representative IAP routes for connecting RKSI STAR endFixes to runway landing-flow groups. Designed to match rksi-star-procedures.json procedure-canonical-v1 structure.
metadata.method: 8 representative routes by STAR endFix and runway group: BITIM/MUNAN for RWY15/16, PAMBI/ENPIL for RWY33/34. Missed approach is excluded.

representativeFor.reason: Representative IAP route from MUNAN for RKSI RWY 15 landing flow

RKSI-IAP-MUNAN-RWY15-REP.name: MUNAN-RWY15-REP
RKSI-IAP-MUNAN-RWY15-REP.sourceProcedure: ILS Y or LOC Y RWY 15L
notes: Representative IAP route for connecting STAR endFix to RKSI runway landing flow.
Missed approach fixes and holding patterns are excluded.
legDistanceNm uses chart/profile distance where available; final MAPt-to-THR distances are rounded for map display.
Use geometry.coordinates for Mapbox LineString rendering. Coordinates are [lon, lat].
